title: Junior SEO Specialist at WOW Skin Science

jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at WOW Skin Science
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with WOW Skin Science! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Gwalior team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About WOW Skin Science:
WOW Skin Science is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with WOW Skin Science!
